Available for high-impact software engineering roles

I'm Dhanush Kukatla
Software Engineer who ships measurable business outcomes

I design and deliver production-grade platforms that move real metrics: faster support resolution, lower latency, and scalable architectures teams can build on. From AI assistants used by 10K+ users/day to cloud-native microservices, I turn complex requirements into reliable, revenue-impacting software.

About Me

Product-minded software engineer focused on speed, reliability, and business impact.

The Engineer You Hire When
Outcomes Matter

I am a software engineer who combines product thinking with deep engineering execution. I build systems that are not only technically sound, but also clearly tied to user and business outcomes. One example: an AI knowledge assistant serving 10K+ users/day with measurable improvements in support efficiency.

My strengths include scalable backend design, cloud-native deployment, real-time architectures, and AI integration in production. If your team needs someone who can own ambiguous problems and ship dependable software quickly, I will add value from day one.

🏗️
Execution at Scale Production systems from architecture through deployment
☁️
Cloud + AI Ready AWS certified, Azure certified, and AI-first implementation experience
🎓
Strong Technical Foundation M.S. Computer Science + hands-on delivery across startup-paced teams

Featured Projects

Click a card to see details. Click again to flip back.

AI Knowledge Assistant

AI Knowledge Assistant

An AI-powered knowledge assistant serving 10K+ users/day with Spring Boot, Pinecone vector store, OpenAI embeddings, and a Next.js chat UI — reducing average support resolution time from 18 to 12 minutes.

Spring BootOpenAIPineconeNext.jsLangChain
Source Demo

Document Intelligence Platform

Document Intelligence Platform

End-to-end RAG platform with agentic query resolution using LangGraph multi-step reasoning and LangChain tool-calling, a React streaming UI with cited answers, and retrieval latency under 200ms.

JavaFastAPILangGraphReactDockerAWS
Source Demo

Enterprise Workflow Platform

Enterprise Workflow Platform

Microservices-based onboarding and approval system for 5 business teams. Includes per-role dashboards, multi-step approval flows, real-time WebSocket notifications, and GraphQL APIs.

Spring BootNext.jsGraphQLWebSocketsPostgreSQL
Source Demo

Request Management System

Request Management System

Internal platform replacing a manual email-based process. Features MySQL-backed REST/GraphQL APIs, Elasticsearch full-text search across 50K+ documents with sub-second query times.

Spring BootMySQLElasticsearchGraphQLREST
Source Demo

Digieye — Accessibility Assistant

Digieye — Accessibility Assistant

Android application delivering real-time assistance for 100+ visually impaired users through speech-based interaction. Features OCR, object detection, and safety workflows using Google ML Kit, TensorFlow Lite, and Twilio, with live location sharing and emergency alerts via Google Maps API.

JavaFirebaseTensorFlow LiteGoogle ML KitTwilio
Source Demo

Satellite Imagery Analysis

Satellite Imagery Analysis

Machine learning platform analyzing Sentinel-2 satellite data for land cover classification, achieving 87% accuracy through advanced preprocessing and algorithm optimization using TensorFlow and scikit-learn.

PythonTensorFlowScikit-LearnAlgorithmsML
Source Demo

Smart Price Finder

Smart Price Finder

Full-stack price comparison platform that searches multiple retailers for a given product, aggregates listings with prices, and highlights the best deal. Built with a responsive frontend and a backend that scrapes and normalizes pricing data in real time.

Full StackWeb ScrapingREST APIJavaScriptNode.js
Source Demo

Hiring for a software engineer who can own architecture and deliver fast? Let's talk.

Bring me your toughest engineering problems.

I help teams ship scalable products, modernize systems, and implement AI features that create measurable value. If you are hiring for someone who can design clean architecture, code at speed, and communicate clearly with stakeholders, I would love to connect.
